g.title: CSS Masking: default <mask> (objectBoundingBox) clips stroke on thin-bbox path

html:meta.content: With a default <mask> reference (maskUnits=objectBoundingBox, x=-10% y=-10% width=120% height=120%) on a stroked path whose geometric bounding box is (50,45,100,10), the mask painting region resolves to (40,44,120,12) and clips the rendered stroke to that rectangle. The visible stroke is a 100x12 green rectangle at (50,44).
html:meta.name: assert
